subcodes.first_line: O blessed souls! Praise be to God that, through the blessings of the guidance of the Manifestations of divine favors of the All-Glorious, and the Daysprings of the lights of the Star [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نفوس مبارکه الحمد لله ببرکت هدایت مظاهر الطاف حضرت احدیت و مطالع انوار کوکب
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @martyrs and martyrdom, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God
